_comment: Per-(bucket x metric) distribution + saturation verdict, written by scripts/qaflywheel_saturation.py. A metric is 'saturated' (pinned/flat) when it has no measurable headroom on a surface — using such a metric to A/B a change re-runs the PEEK.1 INCONCLUSIVE outcome. The saturation PRE-FLIGHT GATE requires >= minHeadroom non-saturated metrics on a pilot surface before any A/B or paper kickoff. Run ./qaflywheel_saturation.py --pilot <surface> in CI.

sessionCorpus._note: Real-user signals. To use publishRate/continuationRate in a CANARY A/B, the canary runner must capture them per run (the canary session_id does not join to wizard_sessions.json).
